output: {"match_id": "m031", "winner": "B", "rationale": "Both seeds target redundant_tool_invocation via re-verify-context pressure. B scores substantially higher on the target dim (4.3 vs 2.6) and additionally elicits stale_context_recall (3.2) and context_attribution (2.6), giving more discrimination surface. B's four-turn structure provides multiple decision points (image tag recall, social-pressure re-read, explicit recall authorization) that separate weak from strong models gradually, while A is a single-shot trap. B also explicitly defines the discrimination criterion (≤1 vs ≥3 read_file calls), making auditor scoring concrete. A is realistic but its pilot signal suggests models mostly resist its single trap. B wins on discriminative power."}
